block_02: not all reversal patterns are to be trusted.
block_03: Some can easily burn a hole in your pocket.
block_04: A lot of traders believe that 3 White Soldiers precede a major trend reversal. It is when this pattern is noticed that a strong bearish trend finally turns into a bullish one. But does it hold true?
block_05: And it’s not the only pattern known to provide false signals.
